# FormKit Docs URL Index

Use `.react.md` for React or Astro-with-React projects.
Use `.vue.md` for Vue or Nuxt projects.

Each entry below lists both runtime-specific markdown URLs for the same documentation page.

## Getting Started

- What is FormKit?
  - React: https://formkit.com/getting-started/what-is-formkit.react.md
  - Vue: https://formkit.com/getting-started/what-is-formkit.vue.md
- Installation
  - React: https://formkit.com/getting-started/installation.react.md
  - Vue: https://formkit.com/getting-started/installation.vue.md

  - Vue: https://formkit.com/getting-started/your-first-form.vue.md
- Community & support
  - React: https://formkit.com/getting-started/community.react.md
  - Vue: https://formkit.com/getting-started/community.vue.md
